articles.title: Who will benefit most from SpaceX IPO? Mostly Elon — and a few from his inner circle
articles.description: Elon Musk has the largest stake in SpaceX by billions of shares. The other biggest shareholders also have longstanding and deep ties to Musk.

articles.title: Waymo halts freeway rides after robotaxis struggle in construction zones
articles.description: The service suspension comes as Waymo has also paused operations in Atlanta and San Antonio after its robotaxis drove into flooded streets.

articles.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes to Twitch to chat with New Yorkers
articles.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series today at 4 p.m. ET.

articles.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
articles.description: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

articles.title: Forget ‘TechnoKing’: Elon Musk will really be king at SpaceX
articles.description: Musk, who will have more than 50% of the voting power, will have a monarchical grip over the publicly-traded version of SpaceX — control that goes far beyond what other tech founders enjoy.

articles.title: Law enforcement shuts down VPN service used by two dozen ransomware gangs
articles.description: First VPN promised hackers complete anonymity for their cyberattacks. But Europol said it was able to notify the service’s users that they have now been identified.

articles.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
articles.description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

articles.title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
articles.description: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

articles.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
articles.description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

articles.title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
articles.description: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

articles.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
articles.description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

articles.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
articles.description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

articles.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
articles.description: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year

articles.title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
articles.description: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

articles.title: Waymo pauses Atlanta service as its robotaxis keep driving into floods
articles.description: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

articles.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
articles.description: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

articles.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
articles.description: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

articles.title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
articles.description: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.

articles.title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
articles.description: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.

articles.title: Wayve’s self-driving tech is headed to US cars made by Stellantis
articles.description: Wayve's self-driving tech will show up in Stellantis vehicles in 2028.

articles.title: IoT gadget maker AcuRite shares reasoning for killing customers’ favorite app
articles.description: "The move to AcuRite NOW has not been as smooth as some customers expected ..."

articles.title: As Grok flounders, SpaceX bets future on beating Big Tech at AI
articles.description: SpaceX IPO filing pitches orbital data centers as Grok lags rival AI services.

articles.title: AT&T sues California in attempt to shut off old phone network
articles.description: AT&T asks a court and the FCC to block California phone requirements.

articles.title: JWST maps the weather on a hot gas giant 700 light-years away

articles.title: Stunning aerial footage still best thing about Top Gun at 40

articles.title: Uh-oh, the International Space Station is leaking again

articles.title: Plug-in hybrids get plugged in more than you might think

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **SpaceX IPO受益者分析**：报道指出，SpaceX若进行IPO，最大受益者将是埃隆·马斯克及其核心圈内少数人，而非普通投资者。
2. **Waymo自动驾驶遇阻**：Waymo因自动驾驶出租车在施工区域和洪水等复杂环境中表现不佳，暂停了高速公路服务及亚特兰大运营，凸显技术瓶颈。
3. **Spotify与AI音乐创新**：Spotify与环球音乐达成协议，允许粉丝制作AI翻唱和混音；同时推出AI驱动的播客问答、简报生成及有声书创作工具，并计划为顶级粉丝预留演唱会门票，以提升用户参与度。
4. **科技监管与安全动态**：特朗普推迟AI安全行政令，称其语言可能阻碍创新；执法机构关闭了被二十多个勒索软件团伙使用的VPN服务，加强网络安全打击。
5. **新兴领域与行业变革**：Convective Capital筹集8500万美元基金用于抗灾技术；一家初创公司挑战近半世纪未变的香水行业；此外，多个搜索引擎在谷歌信誉下滑背景下值得尝试。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Waymo自动驾驶在复杂环境中的持续失败，暴露了当前自动驾驶技术应对现实挑战的局限，而Spotify则通过AI与粉丝互动策略，积极重塑音乐与播客生态。

articles.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
articles.description: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The c

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Google I/O 2026重磅发布**：推出Gemini 3.5模型，强调“前沿智能+行动能力”；同时宣布AI搜索新时代、Google Workspace新功能、AI订阅服务更新，以及AI模式改变美国用户搜索方式。
2. **开源模型与工具更新**：包括更高效的遥感模型OlmoEarth v1.1、新型重排序模型Ettin Reranker Family、基于LoRA/DoRA微调的机器人视频生成模型（NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5），以及支持Transformers后端的OCR工具PaddleOCR 3.5。
3. **社区与实验性项目**：Hugging Face推出开放智能体排行榜；Google在密苏里州宣布新的社区投资；Google Beam推出改善群组会议的新实验。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Google I/O 2026正式宣告进入“智能体Gemini时代”，Gemini 3.5模型将智能与行动能力结合，标志着AI从“回答问题”向“自主执行任务”的关键跃迁。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国在AI领域取得多重进展**：包括定义并开始治理“代理式AI”、强调AI发展需兼顾就业保障，以及Nvidia承认其在中国AI芯片市场已“基本让位”给华为。
2. **中国科技与产业新动向**：特斯拉宣布将在华推出全自动驾驶技术；中国将2000台服务器部署至海底，以满足AI算力需求；欧洲与中国联合发射航天器，用于研究地球“无形护甲”（磁场）。
3. **历史与战略议题**：《环球时报》报道称东京审判揭露了靖国神社的错误历史叙事；中国稀土杠杆作用持续增强；前导弹专家钱学森的故事被重新提及，凸显人才与科技竞争。
4. **国际与安全关注**：有报道称中国存在针对外国人的大规模监控（基于废弃演示仪表盘）；CNN分析认为俄罗斯在乌克兰失利，中国已关注此趋势，并建议特朗普应对；中国对Nvidia 5090D V2芯片实施禁令，而CEO黄仁勋当时正在中国。
5. **文化与历史探索**：报道提及“中世纪中国失落的海洋帝国”以及“登上中国最后一班巴士”等主题，展现对中国历史与当代社会变迁的观察。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在AI领域正加速自主技术布局与治理规则制定，同时通过海底服务器、全自动驾驶落地等举措，推动科技与产业深度融合。
